goal: Build a full-fledged D&D-style sci-fi browser game: character creation, d20 combat, exploration, inventory, quests, enemies, save/load, cinematic dark sci-fi UI. Playable end-to-end.
axes: Game shell UI: title, HUD, panels, dark sci-fi visual system
Rules engine: d20 rolls, stats, skills, advantage, HP, levels
Combat system: turns, enemies, actions, loot, victory/defeat
World: map locations, exploration, NPCs, dialogue, quests
Character creation: races/archetypes sci-fi, point-buy, inventory start
Meta: save/load localStorage, settings, help, polish a11y
